title: ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: ACCESS ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial assistance with electric, gas, heating fuel, and water bills. Assistance is based on available funding and is typically offered once per year per household. 3630 Aviation Way Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Households at or below 60% of the Area Median Income (AMI) Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 779-9020 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 779-6691 Main phone Main phone (541) 779-9020 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information. Income guidelines available online. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: ID, proof of income, utility bill LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY DISASTER SERVICES - CENTER FOR COMMUNITY RESILIENCE FOOD - FOOD PANTRIES FOOD - SENIOR FOOD PANTRIES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OVER THE TOP WIG PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING RETENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT DEPOSIT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - OUTREACH TO SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ACCESS
